perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white vest and dark beret stands in front of a shelf in a large warehouse store, smiling and gesturing at rows of character pillows. (2) She points to Winnie the Pooh, Spiderman, and Stitch pillows, then picks up a Winnie the Pooh set to show how it opens. (3) She presents the product details, pointing to price tags and product signage while maintaining an expressive and enthusiastic facial expression, ending with a thumbs-up gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts; a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice introduces a gift idea. (2) The female vocal continues with a fast pace, describing product features as occasional bright sound effects (dings) play; a deep male voice briefly interjects off-camera. (3) The female narrator discusses pricing and dimensions as the background music maintains a constant rhythm until the clip concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '新生兒送這個超棒的' (This is great for newborns!), Tone: Enthusiastic hook. (2) Functional Text: '雙面毯毯加小枕頭' (Double-sided blanket plus small pillow), Tone: Informative. (3) Decorative Text: '好可愛喔' (So cute), Tone: Emotional emphasis. (4) Functional Text: '$539元', Tone: Factual pricing.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Detail Explanation (Price/Size) -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing on screen; 1 male voice heard off-screen
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman wearing a dark blue beret, a white puffer vest over a light teal long-sleeved shirt, and a dark, tiered ruffle skirt. She carries a small beige crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse shelves filled with character-themed bedding and plush toys. High ceilings with industrial lighting and signage typical of a wholesale club.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Detailed Specification -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation vlog, specifically targeting parents or gift-buyers by showcasing a character-themed pillow and blanket set available at Costco. It aims to inform the audience about the product's features (softness, double-sided design), characters (Disney/Marvel), and value ($539 TWD).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of a specific product with price and location information provided.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with variety-show captions and 'Costco Finds' theme.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical micro-influencer content focused on retail 'hacks' and product discoveries to drive engagement through utility and cute aesthetics.
